bugs.title: Level 2+ freeze â€” CHOICE loop exhaustion
bugs.description: Po ~2-3min gry wszystkie 5 CHOICE_EVENTS sÄ… wyczerpane. triggerChoice() zwraca false ale update loop wychodzi kaÅ¼dÄ… klatkÄ™ przez return â€” gra pozornie zamarza (brak ruchu).

bugs.title: Level 5 boss path never reaches LEVEL_CHALLENGE â€” two failure modes
bugs.description: STALE DESCRIPTION CORRECTED (2026-04-08): The original description was wrong. resolveBoss() in physics.ts DOES set LEVEL_CHALLENGE correctly. Actual failure modes: (A) Stale closure in useBossFight.ts â€” 'finalPower' reads stale useState value at RAF completion, may send power=0 to resolveBoss even after many taps. (B) Level 5 stat-gate â€” resolveBoss() requires score>=5000 AND finances>=60 AND professionalism>=50 AND reputation>=50. Failing stats â†’ phase=PLAYING returned silently, LEVEL_CHALLENGE skipped. Boss is permanently marked bossTriggered=true so fight never retriggers.

component_a.description: Fixed stale closure by using useRef synchronized strictly with setState.

component_b.description: Removed dirty async setTimeout lock. Implemented procedural `bossCooldownTimer` directly into the engine's main loop (dt) to ensure the boss can legally re-trigger after exactly 30s allowing player to recover stats.

bugs.proof_of_done: Level 5: Beating boss (power >= threshold) with correct stats shows LEVEL_CHALLENGE overlay. Beating boss with low stats shows clear feedback and possibility to retry or gain stats.

bugs.title: Double-freeze and micro-pauses during level transitions
bugs.description: Jarring 2s slow-mo and secondary 750ms UI telegraph caused double-freezes. Refactored to physical Level Gates (V-GATE) with seamless transition logic and Dutch localization.
bugs.fix: physics.ts: Removed early UI-phase returns so timeElapsed, particles, and Rainbow Aura keep ticking seamlessly in the background. LevelChallengeOverlay.tsx: Purged 400ms abrupt telegraphing blackout. ReactGameCanvas.tsx / physics.ts: Added fail-safe platform generation if platforms scroll off-screen during slide.
bugs.proof_of_done: Background stays fully animated during level UI popups. No sudden freeze/blackout. No death due to missing platforms on advanceLevel.

bugs.title: Level transition safe-spawn and height parity
bugs.description: Three compounding bugs: (A) GROUND_Y_OFFSET=160 clamped player to y=290 instead of real platform y=410 during LEVEL_FINISH_SEQUENCE. (B) advanceLevel() left stale platforms and no safe floor. (C) Platform failsafe only checked platforms.length===0, not player coverage.
bugs.fix: physics.ts: replaced arbitrary offset clamp with PhysicsEngine.applyPhysics() + absolute ground fallback. ReactGameCanvas.tsx: advanceLevel() now performs clean world bootstrap (clear platforms/items, spawn floor_init, set player x=100/y=300, 2s invincibility). physics.ts: failsafe now checks horizontal coverage (x-50 to x+width+50).
bugs.proof_of_done: 22/22 engine tests pass. Level transitions L1->L2->L3 verified on production without unfair deaths.

fixes.title: useBossFight â€” fix stale closure for finalPower
fixes.approach: Use useRef to track the live power value. Replace: 'const finalPower = power' with ref-based read. Remove 'power' from useCallback deps array to prevent RAF chain restart on every tap.

fixes.title: resolveBoss() â€” add player feedback on stat-gate fail + retry path
fixes.approach: When stat-gate check fails: emit floatText warning about which stat is too low. Set a cooldown before boss can retrigger (reset bossTriggered after 30s). Consider relaxing Level 5 stat-gate for first attempt to prevent permanent soft-lock.
